creator: hm@hm.net.br
text:
this stick is working perfectly in other OS, including 8.3 and WAS WORKING under 9.1, after upgrading it failed

ugen1.3: <Kingston> at usbus1
umass1: <Kingston DataTraveler 2.0, class 0/0, rev 2.00/1.10, addr 3> on usbus1
umass1:  SCSI over Bulk-Only; quirks = 0x4101
umass1:5:1:-1: Attached to scbus5
(probe0:umass-sim1:1:0:0): INQUIRY. CDB: 12 00 00 00 24 00 
(probe0:umass-sim1:1:0:0): CAM status: CCB request completed with an error
(probe0:umass-sim1:1:0:0): Retrying command
